metadata.title: ARCADIA — Mini Game Portal
metadata.description: Play mini games in your browser. No install required.

home.hero_desc: A small collection of browser games — fast, lightweight, nothing to install.

snake.name: Snake
snake.desc: Move the snake, eat, and avoid collisions.

breakout.name: Breakout
breakout.desc: Break bricks and keep the ball in play.

memory.name: Memory
memory.desc: Flip cards and find matching pairs.

footer.tagline: Mini games in the browser — ARCADIA

game.controls_hint: Arrow keys or WASD to move
game.snake_intro: Eat food, avoid walls and your tail — +10 per food, level increases as you eat.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Top 10 high scores per game — auto-refreshes every 30 seconds.
leaderboard.empty: No scores for this game yet.

pages.about_body: ARCADIA — mini games in the browser, no install required.
